summary: No-ship: the route now accepts a composition, but the normal dev-env process still never gets one, so non-default sessions can still place against `default` in production.

findings.title: Dev-env still omits the active composition on normal runner-managed boots
findings.recommendation: Thread `compositionId` into own-port fitting spawns and set `GARRISON_COMPOSITION_ID` for the dev-env process. As shipped, `placeViaOrchestrator` only forwards the composition when that env var already exists, but runner-managed own-port boots currently pass only vault env (`src/lib/runner.ts:371-372`) and `startOwnPortFitting` spawns with just `process.env` plus that extra env (`src/lib/own-port-lifecycle.ts:307-312`). Under the normal `up()` path the dev-env server therefore sends no `composition`, and `/api/orchestrator/place` falls back to `default` again.
